ddls:
CREATE TABLE "damage_functions" (
  "damage_fun_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the damage function */,
  "intensity" INTEGER /* Intensity level of the disaster */,
  "mdd" REAL /* Minimum Damage Degree associated with the intensity */,
  "paa" REAL /* Probability of Aquatic Damage at the intensity */,
  "mdr" REAL /* Minimum Damage Ratio at the intensity */,
  "peril_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the peril type (e.g., TC for Tropical Cyclone) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the disaster at the given intensity */,
  "affected_area" TEXT /* Area affected by the disaster at the given intensity */,
  "population_impact" TEXT /* Population impact at the given intensity */,
  "economic_impact" TEXT /* Economic impact at the given intensity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("damage_fun_id", "intensity")
)

CREATE TABLE "perils" (
  "peril_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each peril type */,
  "peril_name" TEXT /* Name of the peril (e.g., Tropical Cyclone) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the peril and its characteristics */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of occurrence of the peril */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the peril */,
  "last_occurrence" TEXT /* Last occurrence date of the peril */,
  "next_prediction" TEXT /* Next predicted occurrence date of the peril */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peril_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "damage_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each damage report */,
  "damage_fun_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the damage function used for evaluation */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the damage report was created */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the damage occurred */,
  "total_damage" REAL /* Total damage estimated in monetary units */,
  "peril_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the peril type associated with the report */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* User who reported the damage */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., initial, follow-up) */,
  "damage_type" TEXT /* Type of damage (e.g., structural, environmental) */,
  "damage_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the damage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_damage_reports_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_damage_reports_damage_fun_id FOREIGN KEY ("damage_fun_id") REFERENCES damage_functions ("damage_fun_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_damage_reports_peril_id FOREIGN KEY ("peril_id") REFERENCES perils ("peril_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, response team, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disaster_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disaster event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the disaster occurred */,
  "peril_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the peril type involved */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the disaster occurred */,
  "intensity" INTEGER /* Intensity of the disaster */,
  "damage_report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related damage report */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the disaster event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the disaster event */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the disaster event */,
  "affected_population" INTEGER /* Population affected by the disaster */,
  "affected_infrastructure" TEXT /* Infrastructure affected by the disaster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disaster_events_peril_id FOREIGN KEY ("peril_id") REFERENCES perils ("peril_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disaster_events_damage_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("damage_report_id") REFERENCES damage_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the risk assessment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disaster event being assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level determined (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or findings from the assessment */,
  "assessed_by" INTEGER /* User who conducted the assessment */,
  "assessment_method" TEXT /* Method used for the assessment */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES disaster_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_assessed_by FOREIGN KEY ("assessed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the response action */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disaster event being responded to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who took the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., evacuation, resource deployment) */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "resources_used" TEXT /* Resources used for the action */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_actions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES disaster_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the historical data record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disaster event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the disaster event */,
  "total_damage" REAL /* Total damage recorded in monetary units */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities reported */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries reported */,
  "displaced_population" INTEGER /* Number of displaced population */,
  "recovery_time" TEXT /* Time taken for recovery */,
  "recovery_cost" REAL /* Cost of recovery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES disaster_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user providing feedback */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disaster event */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "action_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the response action */,
  "suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES disaster_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user receiving the notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disaster event related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., warning, update) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES disaster_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the role */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
